componentDescription: Renders a UI for audio input, offering recording controls, file upload, waveform display, and playback preview.

onAudio.description: Callback function invoked when an audio file is ready, typically after recording or selection.

recording.description: Indicates whether audio recording is currently active.

paused.description: Indicates whether the active audio recording is currently paused.

audioBlob.description: Stores the recorded audio data as a Blob object, or null if no audio has been recorded.

analyserNode.description: Holds an AnalyserNode instance, used for visualizing audio data, or null if not initialized.

duration.description: Represents the current duration of the recorded audio in seconds.

error.description: Stores any error message that occurred during audio recording or processing, or null if no error.

startRecording.description: Function to initiate the audio recording process.

stopRecording.description: Function to finalize and stop the audio recording.

pauseRecording.description: Function to temporarily halt the audio recording.

resumeRecording.description: Function to continue a previously paused audio recording.

resetRecording.description: Function to clear all recorded audio and reset the recording state.

handleFileChange.description: Function to handle changes from a file input element, typically for uploading audio files.
